_comment: Default DEMO topology, applied on first start. In development this repo file is bind-mounted; in production (single/traefik/coolify) it is seeded into the 'rabbitmq-config' Docker volume on first boot and can then be edited at runtime (e.g. via the Coolify file browser / a Coolify file mount). Full field reference: docs/messaging-topology.md. SECURITY: the demo user reuses the admin password (RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS) for zero-config convenience — change the password or remove this user for real workloads.
